---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    toc: false
    self_contained: false
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
date: ""
---

<style type="text/css">
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

:root {
  --uv-red: #d71920;
  --uv-blue: #0f4c81;
  --uv-navy: #102a43;
  --uv-ink: #243b53;
  --uv-muted: #627d98;
  --uv-bg: #f6f8fb;
  --uv-card: rgba(255,255,255,0.94);
  --uv-line: #e6edf5;
  --uv-soft-blue: #eaf4ff;
  --uv-soft-red: #fff0f1;
  --shadow-sm: 0 8px 24px rgba(16,42,67,.08);
  --shadow-md: 0 18px 55px rgba(16,42,67,.14);
  --radius-lg: 24px;
  --radius-md: 16px;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  color: var(--uv-ink);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(215,25,32,.10), transparent 34rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(15,76,129,.12), transparent 34rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, var(--uv-bg) 40%, #ffffff 100%);
  line-height: 1.65;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 18px 26px 80px;
}

h1, h2, h3, h4 { color: var(--uv-navy); font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
h2 {
  margin-top: 34px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--uv-line);
  position: relative;
}
h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  bottom: -3px;
  width: 92px;
  height: 3px;
  border-radius: 99px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--uv-red), var(--uv-blue));
}

p { font-size: 1.04rem; }

.hero-section {
  margin: 18px 0 34px;
  padding: 34px;
  border-radius: 32px;
  color: #fff;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16,42,67,.94), rgba(15,76,129,.92)),
    url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1677442136019-21780ecad995?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1800&q=80');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.hero-section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 80% 15%, rgba(255,255,255,.18), transparent 22rem);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 980px; }
.hero-logo {
  width: 120px;
  max-width: 32%;
  background: #fff;
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: 22px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.16);
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.34);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: .78rem;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
}
.hero-section h1 {
  color: #fff;
  margin: 18px 0 10px;
  font-size: clamp(2.15rem, 4vw, 4.8rem);
  line-height: 1.03;
}
.hero-subtitle {
  max-width: 800px;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 1.8vw, 1.45rem);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero-badges, .hero-actions, .quick-facts {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 12px;
}
.badge-soft {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.hero-actions { margin-top: 24px; }
.hero-actions a {
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-weight: 800;
  background: #fff;
  color: var(--uv-blue);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
}
.hero-actions a:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.18); }

.quick-facts {
  margin: -8px 0 30px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}
.fact-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--uv-line);
  background: var(--uv-card);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  padding: 18px 20px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.fact-label { color: var(--uv-muted); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; }
.fact-value { color: var(--uv-navy); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; margin-top: 4px; }

.intro-card, .profile-card, .resource-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--uv-line);
  background: var(--uv-card);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  padding: 26px;
  margin: 22px 0;
}
.intro-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 190px 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
  align-items: center;
}
.intro-card img {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 24px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(16,42,67,.12);
}
.resource-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}
.resource-tile {
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--uv-line);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 16px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff, #f7fbff);
  color: var(--uv-navy) !important;
  transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease, border-color .18s ease;
}
.resource-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); border-color: #b8d8f4; }
.resource-tile strong { display: block; font-size: 1.02rem; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.resource-tile span { color: var(--uv-muted); font-size: .92rem; }

.profile-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 210px 1fr;
  gap: 26px;
  align-items: center;
}
.profile-card img {
  width: 210px;
  height: 210px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 8px solid #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(16,42,67,.16);
}
.profile-card h3 { margin: 0 0 6px; font-size: 1.65rem; }
.profile-card p { color: var(--uv-muted); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.profile-card a, .main-container > p a {
  color: var(--uv-blue);
  font-weight: 800;
  text-decoration-thickness: 2px;
  text-underline-offset: 3px;
}

.nav-pills {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 10px 0 28px;
  padding: 12px !important;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.74);
  border: 1px solid var(--uv-line);
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.nav-pills > li { margin: 0 !important; }
.nav-pills > li > a {
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  color: var(--uv-blue) !important;
  font-weight: 800;
  padding: 10px 14px !important;
  transition: background .18s ease, color .18s ease, transform .18s ease;
}
.nav-pills > li.active > a,
.nav-pills > li.active > a:hover,
.nav-pills > li > a:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--uv-red), var(--uv-blue)) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.tab-content {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.76);
  border: 1px solid var(--uv-line);
  border-radius: 24px;
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

.table-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin: 22px 0 34px;
  border-radius: 22px;
  border: 1px solid var(--uv-line);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  background: #fff;
}
table {
  width: 100% !important;
  border-collapse: separate !important;
  border-spacing: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  background: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: .95rem;
}
th, td {
  border: 0 !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--uv-line) !important;
  vertical-align: top !important;
  padding: 16px !important;
}
th {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--uv-navy), var(--uv-blue)) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  min-width: 150px;
}
tr:nth-child(even) td { background: #fbfdff; }
tr:hover td { background: #f2f8ff; }
td a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 3px 4px 6px 0;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid #d9e8f6;
  background: #f7fbff;
  color: var(--uv-blue) !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.25;
}
td a:hover { background: var(--uv-soft-blue); border-color: #b8d8f4; }

center img, p img {
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 26px rgba(16,42,67,.12);
}

blockquote {
  border-left: 5px solid var(--uv-red);
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 16px 18px;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

.floating-top {
  position: fixed;
  right: 18px;
  bottom: 18px;
  z-index: 999;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 12px 15px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--uv-red), var(--uv-blue));
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
  font-weight: 800;
  cursor: pointer;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .main-container { padding: 12px 14px 70px; }
  .hero-section { padding: 24px; border-radius: 24px; }
  .quick-facts, .resource-grid, .intro-card, .profile-card { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .profile-card img { width: 170px; height: 170px; }
  .tab-content { padding: 14px; }
  th, td { padding: 12px !important; }
}
</style>

<style type="text/css">
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Atkinson+Hyperlegible:wght@400;700&family=Inter:wght@600;700;800&display=swap');

/* Ajustes de legibilidad: fuente más grande, clara y cómoda para lectura en pantalla */
html {
  font-size: 18px;
}

body {
  font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.78;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 1180px;
}

p, li, td, th, blockquote,
.intro-card p,
.profile-card p,
.resource-card p,
.tab-content,
.hero-subtitle {
  font-size: 1.12rem;
}

h1, h2, h3, h4,
.hero-section h1,
.fact-label,
.fact-value,
.badge-soft,
.hero-actions a,
.resource-tile strong,
.nav-pills > li > a {
  font-family: 'Inter', 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
}

h2 {
  font-size: 1.85rem;
  line-height: 1.22;
  margin-top: 42px;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  line-height: 1.28;
}

.profile-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.9rem;
}

.hero-section h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2.55rem, 4.4vw, 5.2rem);
}

.hero-subtitle {
  font-size: clamp(1.18rem, 2vw, 1.55rem);
  line-height: 1.58;
}

.badge-soft,
.hero-actions a,
.fact-value {
  font-size: 1.06rem;
}

.resource-tile strong {
  font-size: 1.14rem;
}

.resource-tile span,
.fact-label,
.eyebrow {
  font-size: .98rem;
}

.nav-pills {
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 14px !important;
}

.nav-pills > li > a {
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  padding: 13px 18px !important;
}

.tab-content {
  padding: 30px;
}

table {
  font-size: 1.06rem;
}

th, td {
  padding: 18px !important;
}

td a {
  font-size: 1.02rem;
  padding: 8px 12px;
}

.floating-top {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  padding: 14px 17px;
}

@media (min-width: 1200px) {
  html { font-size: 19px; }
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  html { font-size: 17px; }
  body { line-height: 1.72; }
  p, li, td, th, blockquote, .tab-content { font-size: 1.06rem; }
  .tab-content { padding: 18px; }
  .nav-pills > li > a { font-size: 1rem; padding: 11px 14px !important; }
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  function ensureMainContainer() {
    if (document.querySelector('.main-container')) return;
    var wrapper = document.createElement('div');
    wrapper.className = 'main-container';
    var nodes = Array.from(document.body.childNodes).filter(function (node) {
      if (node.nodeType === 1 && ['SCRIPT', 'STYLE', 'LINK'].indexOf(node.tagName) !== -1) return false;
      if (node.nodeType === 1 && node.classList.contains('floating-top')) return false;
      if (node.nodeType === 3 && !node.textContent.trim()) return false;
      return true;
    });
    document.body.insertBefore(wrapper, document.body.firstChild);
    nodes.forEach(function (node) { wrapper.appendChild(node); });
  }

  function buildTabsetIfNeeded() {
    if (document.querySelector('.tab-content .tab-pane') || document.querySelector('.nav.nav-pills')) return;
    var tabset = document.querySelector('h1.tabset, h1.tabset-pills');
    if (!tabset) return;
    var sections = [];
    var node = tabset.nextElementSibling;
    while (node && node.tagName !== 'H1') {
      if (node.tagName === 'H2') {
        var heading = node;
        var title = heading.textContent.trim() || 'Sección';
        var items = [];
        node = heading.nextElementSibling;
        while (node && node.tagName !== 'H2' && node.tagName !== 'H1') {
          var next = node.nextElementSibling;
          items.push(node);
          node = next;
        }
        sections.push({ heading: heading, title: title, items: items });
      } else {
        node = node.nextElementSibling;
      }
    }
    if (!sections.length) return;
    var nav = document.createElement('ul');
    nav.className = 'nav nav-pills custom-tabset';
    var content = document.createElement('div');
    content.className = 'tab-content custom-tab-content';
    tabset.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', content);
    tabset.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', nav);
    sections.forEach(function (section, index) {
      var id = 'curso-tab-' + index;
      var li = document.createElement('li');
      if (index === 0) li.className = 'active';
      var a = document.createElement('a');
      a.href = '#' + id;
      a.textContent = section.title;
      a.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        document.querySelectorAll('.custom-tabset li').forEach(function (x) { x.classList.remove('active'); });
        document.querySelectorAll('.custom-tab-content .tab-pane').forEach(function (x) { x.classList.remove('active'); x.style.display = 'none'; });
        li.classList.add('active');
        panel.classList.add('active');
        panel.style.display = 'block';
        window.scrollTo({ top: nav.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - 18, behavior: 'smooth' });
      });
      li.appendChild(a);
      nav.appendChild(li);
      var panel = document.createElement('div');
      panel.id = id;
      panel.className = 'tab-pane' + (index === 0 ? ' active' : '');
      panel.style.display = index === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
      panel.appendChild(section.heading);
      section.items.forEach(function (item) { panel.appendChild(item); });
      content.appendChild(panel);
    });
    tabset.style.display = 'none';
  }

  ensureMainContainer();
  buildTabsetIfNeeded();

  document.querySelectorAll('table').forEach(function (table) {
    if (!table.parentElement.classList.contains('table-wrap')) {
      var wrapper = document.createElement('div');
      wrapper.className = 'table-wrap';
      table.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, table);
      wrapper.appendChild(table);
    }
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="http"]').forEach(function (a) {
    a.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
    a.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
  });
  var topButton = document.createElement('button');
  topButton.className = 'floating-top';
  topButton.textContent = '↑';
  topButton.title = 'Volver arriba';
  topButton.onclick = function () { window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }); };
  document.body.appendChild(topButton);
});
</script>

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <img class="hero-logo" src="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ystrb6z1a80f6v5j7tamv/LogoUnivalle.jpg?rlkey=vltdgl81p4nofag4u1f9f24wc&dl=1" alt="Logo Universidad del Valle">
    <div class="eyebrow">Diplomado virtual</div>
    <h1>Inteligencia Artificial para Tod@s</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Una experiencia práctica, clara y crítica para comprender, evaluar y usar herramientas de IA en la vida académica, laboral y cotidiana.</p>
    <div class="hero-badges">
      <span class="badge-soft">📅 22 de junio – 10 de septiembre</span>
      <span class="badge-soft">🕕 Lunes, martes y jueves · 6–9 p.m.</span>
      <span class="badge-soft">💻 Modalidad virtual</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/4j62wdxdrh931c8gqtlln/cronograma_inteligencia_artificial_para_todos.docx?rlkey=o2fqu3v7pnyu96hvcnznzeas4&dl=1">📘 Contenido oficial</a>
      <a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2ug8heo2ilh8blc7f3fno/Modulos-Fechas.jpg?rlkey=1ox67162dyj6n6nzshdt5vmy9&dl=1">🗓️ Módulos</a>
      <a href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/4gv9cdmkl0jigx5dheign/cronograma_curso_100_horas.pdf?rlkey=uzknc9ym5j3tmr321173g0pd9&dl=1">📄 Cronograma detallado</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="quick-facts">
  <div class="fact-card"><div class="fact-label">Tema central</div><div class="fact-value">IA generativa y aplicaciones</div></div>
  <div class="fact-card"><div class="fact-label">Enfoque</div><div class="fact-value">Práctico, ético y accesible</div></div>
  <div class="fact-card"><div class="fact-label">Audiencia</div><div class="fact-value">Todas las áreas del conocimiento</div></div>
</div>
```

## Información General

```{=html}
<div class="intro-card">
  <img src="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/541hi9r1sgtlqfqf94kx1/AI.jpeg?rlkey=959jbs2u5z5f0gne7fbwfjkm8&dl=1" alt="Imagen de inteligencia artificial">
  <div>
    <h3>Propósito del curso</h3>
    <p>El curso <strong>Inteligencia Artificial para Todos</strong> tiene como objetivo brindar a personas de todas las áreas del conocimiento una comprensión clara, accesible y práctica de los conceptos fundamentales de la inteligencia artificial. A lo largo del curso, los participantes explorarán cómo funciona la IA, sus principales aplicaciones en la vida cotidiana y el mundo laboral, así como sus implicaciones éticas y sociales.</p>
    <p>Se busca empoderar a los asistentes para que comprendan, evalúen y utilicen herramientas de IA de manera informada, promoviendo un pensamiento crítico frente a su uso y fomentando una participación activa en conversaciones sobre el futuro digital.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="resource-card">
  <h3>Recursos principales</h3>
  <div class="resource-grid">
    <a class="resource-tile" href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/4j62wdxdrh931c8gqtlln/cronograma_inteligencia_artificial_para_todos.docx?rlkey=o2fqu3v7pnyu96hvcnznzeas4&dl=1"><strong>Contenido oficial</strong><span>Documento base del diplomado</span></a>
    <a class="resource-tile" href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2ug8heo2ilh8blc7f3fno/Modulos-Fechas.jpg?rlkey=1ox67162dyj6n6nzshdt5vmy9&dl=1"><strong>Cronograma por módulos</strong><span>Vista general de fechas</span></a>
    <a class="resource-tile" href="https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/4gv9cdmkl0jigx5dheign/cronograma_curso_100_horas.pdf?rlkey=uzknc9ym5j3tmr321173g0pd9&dl=1"><strong>Cronograma detallado</strong><span>Plan completo del curso</span></a>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){if(!window.chatbase||window.chatbase("getState")!=="initialized"){window.chatbase=(...arguments)=>{if(!window.chatbase.q){window.chatbase.q=[]}window.chatbase.q.push(arguments)};window.chatbase=new Proxy(window.chatbase,{get(target,prop){if(prop==="q"){return target.q}return(...args)=>target(prop,...args)}})}const onLoad=function(){const script=document.createElement("script");script.src="https://www.chatbase.co/embed.min.js";script.id="lCBX5rXaVC0oAgQ85d15-";script.domain="www.chatbase.co";document.body.appendChild(script)};if(document.readyState==="complete"){onLoad()}else{window.addEventListener("load",onLoad)}})();
</script>
```

<!-- **Evaluación:**<br> -->

<!-- Participación en clases y talleres: 60%<br> -->
<!-- Tareas prácticas y ejercicios: 20%<br> -->
<!-- Proyecto final: 20%<br> -->

<!-- **Asistencia Mínimo 80%**<br> -->

<!-- [Estudiantes Inscritos](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/nhffqd5wpgwhztavwyfj6/ASISTENCIA-UNIFICADA-DIPLOMADO-IA-2025.xlsx?rlkey=6921ah7ngxfgaxqnda6f0336n&dl=1)<br> -->


# Profesor y semanas {.tabset .tabset-pills}

## Profesor

```{=html}
<div class="profile-card">
  <img src="https://github.com/jamelende/PaginasWeb/raw/main/FotoAlf.png" alt="Alfonso Meléndez">
  <div>
    <h3>M.Sc. Alfonso Meléndez</h3>
    <p>Profesor Titular · Escuela Colombiana de Ingeniería</p>
    <a href="https://jamelende.github.io/PaginasWeb/HojadeVida/HojaDeVida2026Def.html">Ver hoja de vida</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Semana 1



<td>


</td>

 <tr>
    
<th>**Sesión 1: 19 de Noviembre** </th>


    
 <td> **IA Generativa ** <br></br>
      Presentación del Curso <br>
      ¿Qué es la IA Generativa? <br>

 </td>
    
<td>

[Introducción a la IA Generativa](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/gb083k60t1pluofdepqi0/1.-Introducci-nDef-CID.pptx?rlkey=khczh6wpbxjngb3qyubbbkdvt&dl=1)<br>

</td>

<td>

**Lecturas Iniciales**<br>


[1. Héctor Abad El Espectador Enero 2024](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/h79d5timf8gvwcwfqa3gp/Art-culo-Hector-Abad.pdf?rlkey=n15iuqcli6vn0p2tlfraukbdk&dl=1)<br>

[2. Verdades de Una Entrevista Fake, Vladdo](https://www.eltiempo.com/opinion/columnistas/verdades-de-una-entrevista-fake-3509908)<br>

 [3. UNESCO. Ia Generativa y Educación](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/o1xnd6rtoe4c2aqbyg6yw/UnescoLecturaInicial.pdf?rlkey=zktamalwsjn10mwst8ucitv2l&dl=1)<br>
[Notebook LM Asociado](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/9c1f4c2f-7770-44fe-861d-ad7fac617d1a?_gl=1*rh4mir*_ga*ODcwMjYzNTcuMTc1MTU2NDYxMA..*_ga_W0LDH41ZCB*czE3NTE1Njc2MTQkbzIkZzAkdDE3NTE1Njc2MTQkajYwJGwwJGgw)<br>

[IA Generativa:Promesas y Peligros](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/utt04yoj417w4bd11qax6/NaturePromisePerilAISpanish.pdf?rlkey=wqmgflei7763k0k3nsklqk1qp&dl=0)<br>
[Notebook LM Asociado](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/bfe581da-8462-4fa9-a89e-bd176a50ab10?_gl=1*18ecfml*_ga*ODcwMjYzNTcuMTc1MTU2NDYxMA..*_ga_W0LDH41ZCB*czE3NTE1NjQ2MDkkbzEkZzEkdDE3NTE1NjUxNzgkajE4JGwwJGgw)<br>

[Libro Kaplan GenAI, Excelente](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/rq0ku0asw0nzpf2v1qvzy/Generative-Artificial-Intelligence_-What-Everyone-Needs-to-Kaplan-Jerry-1-2024-Oxford-University-Press-Incorporated-9780197773536-3a477cfaf159685c963a4816c61a16ad-Anna-s-Archive.pdf?rlkey=u2i5uz6cs7ryeigrlwwzug1mn&dl=1)<br>

[1. Abdel Hadi: GenAi is just the begining](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z7-fPFtgRE4)<br>
[2. Fei Fei Li:  Spatial Intelligence](https://www.ted.com/talks/fei_fei_li_with_spatial_intelligence_ai_will_understand_the_real_world?subtitle=en&lng=es&geo=es)<br>
[3. Geoffrey Hinton GodFather of Ai 13 minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qrvK_KuIeJk&t=75s)<br>
[4. Yoshua Bengio Rise of AI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uawLjkSI7Mo)<br>
[5. Mustafa Suleyman, What is an AI anyway 22 minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KKNCiRWd_j0&t=158s)<br>
[6. Video Melanie Mitchell](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V95W9g-SsBU&t=3053s)<br>
[7. Eric Schmidt, Solomon Future of AI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MW9FGwh3wjE)<br>
 

 </td>
 
 </tr>
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 <br><br><br>
 
 
 
 </tr>
 
 
 </table>
 
 <br><br><br>
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

## Semana 2


<center> ![](<center> ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/8j7rco1a9hict3pmzjzzr/Interpretability-vs-Prediction.jpeg?rlkey=nvrw56d8co72ak03n6vkxcgsq&dl=1){width=25%}<br>


<td>


</td>

<table border="1">
 <tr>
    <th> </th>
    <th>Descripción</th>
    <th>Diapositivas</th>
    <th> Lecturas y Talleres</th>
    <th> Material Adicional</th>
  </tr>

 <tr>

<th>Sesión 1 : 26 de Noviembre</th>


  <td>
  
**¿Qué es ML: Introducción y Contexto**<br>


   </td>

<td>
**Contexto**<br>
[1. Introducción](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/mwbkvedqo6jkeaz3wk2i9/0.-Introducci-n.pptx?rlkey=37lcrnf01y66upy2yb2peg2h4&dl=1)<br>
[2. El Poder de lo Digital](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/zzr1icivvnlybgbg3w7yb/1.-El-Poder-de-lo-Digital.pptx?rlkey=74ga9houyvwvet1da09hzkzac&dl=1)<br>

**¿Qué es ML? DataCamp**<br>
[1. ¿Qué es ML?](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7fwjfbsho9t5iptuzmn60/1.-What-is-ML.pptx?rlkey=mr84hkpox4qespwjbsyo248xy&dl=1)<br>
[2. Aprendizaje Supervisado](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/4jtb9bqh5qq3k70mqkrzw/2.-Supervised-learning.pptx?rlkey=vvjxi9pd3rxodld761mc8510e&dl=1)<br>
[3.  Aprendizaje No Supervisado](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/gjzfspk6op3jmxgs8ey4t/3.-Unsupervised-learning.pptx?rlkey=12nbbz2hyrb4w6b7gtn1mtxtk&dl=1)<br>


  </td>

  <td>
  
  **Lecturas**<br>
  
[1. Athem Alpaydin ¿Qué es ML?Español](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/n26x19eoomju1oqpvbtsa/Prefacio-Espa-ol.docx?rlkey=hk4y5972luszdortd53nn8yuz&dl=1)<br>
[Inglés](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/s4emd0rx13sz3zqiguf9e/Prefacio-Ingl-s.pdf?rlkey=gm17ggkw732ov75jh6m6wsgso&dl=1)<br>
**Adicional**<br>
[2. Melanie Mitchell ¿Qué es la IA?,Español](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/md8dvmnds7vfhv88obnr4/Terrified-Espa-ol.docx?rlkey=p4gp5yd98nd8q481dlryaa67m&dl=1)<br>
[Inglés](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/6rmorlk5h7h8r8dwcqhye/Terrified-Ingl-s.pdf?rlkey=28q4zg0dpanpnlzirh0tn6jxa&dl=1)<br>
  
</td>

<td>


**Videos:**<br>
[1. Computer Scientist Explains Machine Learning in 5 Levels of Difficulty | WIRED](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5q87K1WaoFI)<br>
[2. Qué es el Machine Learning? 7 min (dot.csv)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KytW151dpqU)<br>
[3. Machine Learning (Up and Atom), 5 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3bJ7RChxMWQ)<br>
[4. A Brief History of AI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yaL5ZMvRRqE)<br>
[5. What is ML 365 data Science, 5 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7gbGavTLUUE)<br>
[6. Andrew Ng: Machine learning 9 min](https://www.coursera.org/learn/ai-for-everyone/lecture/5TPFo/machine-learning)<br>
[7. Stat Quest: A gentle introduction to machine learning 13 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gv9_4yMHFhI)<br>

 </td>

 </tr>


 <th>Sesión 1: 26 de Noviembre</th>


  <td>
  **Aprendizaje Supervisado**<br>
   </td>

<td>

**Contexto**<br>
[3. Datos Sociales](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/383gcopekggic7b2fm46y/2.-Datos-Sociales.pptx?rlkey=awh3z2owzp5ybuvmf9uz8h03l&dl=1)<br>
[4. Aprendizaje vs Programación](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/nddfx4osyocokzxsnfchp/3.-Aprendizaje-vs-Programaci-n.pptx?rlkey=0xrkmlp21fcge9578yubl7agf&dl=1)<br>
**¿Qué es ML?**<br>
[1. Int al Machine Learning, Serrano](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/wgrhv80s66blydhfevhb4/Introduccion_al_aprendizaje_automatico_def.pptx?rlkey=2t378er2wjpldusran7jgnubp&dl=1)<br>
**Modelos Básicos de ML:**<br>
**Regresión lineal,Regresión  Logística y Árboles de Decisión**<br>
[2. Regresión y Clasificación 5 Ejemplos](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9b25bjb09zh58fsbqlzh0/2.Clasificaci-n-Regresi-n.pptx?rlkey=ltue7hy3beo5tq7bnlteceb56&dl=1)<br>
  </td>

  <td>
  
**Lecturas:**<br>
[1. Yoshua Bengio Introducción a ML y DL](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fttb99tv97zamfh4gavu0/Introduccion_GBC_Completo_Elegante_V3.docx?rlkey=q234qytv7vbnp4g2c7unudimm&dl=1)<br>
[2. Francois Chollet Modelos de ML](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tlc096tzct9di7r6f817v/Historia_ML_Chollet_Completo_Elegante_V3.docx?rlkey=u09so11ps8njtims52uftp1ez&dl=1)<br>
**Taller**<br>
**Enfermedades Cardiacas**<br>
[Lectura Taller](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/py5cvvonrkz0gsjgwdwbw/Taller-Desaf-o-Diagn-stico-Autom-tico.pptx?rlkey=yrn7r1o6er10vr2pvkrdv1auc&dl=1)<br>
[Slides Taller](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/d3w6oj7dyg735xcfcspgv/Desaf-o-Diagn-stico-Autom-tico.pdf?rlkey=o4fqgogbrjogcywnjqwz1wyk5&dl=1)<br>
  
**PlayGrounds**<br>
[1. Least Squares Regression (Colorado)](https://phet.colorado.edu/sims/html/least-squares-regression/latest/least-squares-regression_all.html)<br>

[2. Logistic Regression (San Diego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/classify.html)<br>

[3. Decision Tree Applet (San Diego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/classify.html)<br>
**Cuadernos Jupyter ML**<br>
[1. Linear Regression](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_03_Linear_Regression/Coding_linear_regression.ipynb)<br>
[1.1 Predicción Precios Casas](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_03_Linear_Regression/House_price_predictions.ipynb)<br>
[2. Logistic regression](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_06_Logistic_Regression/Coding_logistic_regression.ipynb)<br>
[2.1 Sentiment Analysis](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_06_Logistic_Regression/Sentiment_analysis_IMDB.ipynb)<br>
[3. Decision Trees](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_09_Decision_Trees/Graphical_example.ipynb)<br>
<!-- [5. Random Forest Applet](https://cs.stanford.edu/~karpathy/svmjs/demo/demoforest.html)<br> -->


  </td>

<td>

**Videos:**<br>

**Modelos Básicos de Aprendizaje Supervisado**<br>
[0. Excellent Logistic vs Linear regression](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3bvM3NyMiE0)<br>
[1. Clasificación (google) 2 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QM0sYbEQSkM)<br>
[2. Regresión Logística (google) 2 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=72AHKztZN44)<br>
[3. Regresión Lineal (Gradient Descent) (google) 2 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QoK1nNAURw4&t=90s)<br>
[4. Árboles de Decisión stat Quest 18 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_L39rN6gz7Y)<br>
[5. Random Forests StatQuest 10 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J4Wdy0Wc_xQ&t=1s)<br>
**Aplicaciones Modelos Básicos**<br>
[1. Predicción de Precios de casas en Python 44 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wqmtf9SA_kk)<br>
[2. Detección de Spam Python 35 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FkF2jhaRJIs)<br>
[3. Sistemas de recomendación con Python 19 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8bD8Pagirao)<br>
[4. Análisis de Sentimientos (TED) 15 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n4L5hHFcGVk)<br>
[5. Reconocimiento de imágenes con Python 22 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oEKg_jiV1Ng)<br>

 </td>

 </tr>



 <th>Sesión 2 : 28 de Noviembre</th>


 <td>

**Aprendizaje  Supervisado**



   </td>

<td>
**Otros Métodos Supervisados**<br>

**A. Support Vector Machines**<br>
[1. Slides Support Vector Machines-Gamma](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/cb1jmsbayg1a5pyg73hdz/Maquinas-de-Soporte-Vectorial-y-el-Metodo-Kernel-1.pptx?rlkey=kuvuxynfwn66sd2x7tqisjvxj&dl=1)<br>
[2. Support Vector Machine in 2 Minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_YPScrckx28&t=43s)<br>
[3. Support Vector Machine in 7 Minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y6RRHw9uN9o)<br>

[4. Video Stat Quest SVM Inglés 20 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=efR1C6CvhmE&t=1148s)
**Importante ver el video en casa al lado del ChatGpt**<br>
**B. Naive bayes**<br>

[1. Video Naive bayes : Luis Serrano  Español 19 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=De2gX2rWGbs)<br>
[2. Video Opcional Naive Bayes StatQuest 15 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O2L2Uv9pdDA&t=104s)<br>
[3. Slides Naive bayas gamma Spam](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ngjk4ogoieiw4ubxzzn4f/Clasificadores-Naive-Bayes-Spam-Reclamar2-Errores6.pptx?rlkey=qi10iip26gjg0ttgpeadjbivx&dl=1)<br>
[4. Slides Naive bayas gamma Jubilación](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/whvyfwrsrnr3va3fjhd5c/Clasificadores-Naive-Bayes-Jubilaci-n.pptx?rlkey=dorx7dgbeulxsc6o5fo7xv49f&dl=1)<br>
[5. Video Naive bayes Explained Udemy 14 min](https://www.udemy.com/tutorial/machinelearning/naive-bayes-intuition/?srsltid=AfmBOoocny0iH36ksuz4Pulk10fohOO2KpDzc0H9fYDikviZcgotwccC)<br>

  </td>

  <td>

**Lecturas Adicionales(Fernando Sancho)**<br>
[1. Fundamentos de Machine Learning](https://www.cs.us.es/~fsancho/Blog/posts/Fundamentos_de_ML/)<br>
[2. Aprendizaje Supervisado y no Supervisado](https://www.cs.us.es/~fsancho/Blog/posts/Aprendizaje_Supervisado_No_Supervisado.md.html)<br>
[3. Algoritmos de Clustering](https://www.cs.us.es/~fsancho/Blog/posts/Clustering/)<br>
**PlayGrounds**<br>

[1. Support vector machine (San Diego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/classify.html)<br>
[1. Quadratic Naive Bayes (San Diego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/classify.html)<br>
[3. Redes Neuronales (San Diego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/neuralnetwork.html)<br>
[4. K Nearest Neighbour (San Diego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/classify.html)<br>

 **Cuadernos Jupyter ML**<br>
[1 University Admissions](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_09_Decision_Trees/University_Admissions.ipynb)<br>
[2. Naive bayes](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_08_Naive_Bayes/Coding_naive_Bayes.ipynb)<br>
[3. Complete example](https://github.com/luisguiserrano/manning/blob/master/Chapter_13_End_to_end_example/End_to_end_example.ipynb)<br>


  
 </td>

<td>

**Videos:**<br>

 <th>Sesión 2: 28 de Noviembre</th>


   <td>

 **Aprendizaje Supervisado y  No Supervisado**
   </td>

<td>

**Modelos Supervisados avanzados**<br>

**C. KNN**<br>
[1. K nearest Neighbours-gamma ppt](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/qwlcs31gxwdek17tlpyy8/Aprendizaje-Supervisado-KNN.pptx?rlkey=kdaj0ovj9zcrt9rgcii8g1ncg&dl=1)<br>

[1. Redes Neuronales y Aprendizaje ppt](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sdg71qkhi38zw2575zmb9/3.-Redes_Neuronales_y_Aprendizaje.pptx?rlkey=98nl1p8521311k8eorkv0e7an&dl=1)<br>

**E. AdaBoost**<br>
[1. Mejorando Modelos Débiles , AdaBoost](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ofz2xkuavhasxt1fwzww0/What_is_AdaBoost_Friendly_Explanation.pptx?rlkey=4xzp3b0w4azdw505xpfp54ydj&dl=1)<br>
[2. What is Ada Boost? 5  min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8pS2xS1Qc3I)<br>
[3. Ada Boost StatQuest 20 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LsK-xG1cLYA)<br>

**Modelos No Supervisados Básicos**<br>
[1. Modelo  de k-medias](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/xsj7j4vs10o5y4qq5rni6/11.-Aprendizaje-no-supervisado-k-medios.pptx?rlkey=418kcmrzzqxqjaeyt30oda8g4&dl=1)<br>
[2. Modelo de Clustering Jerárquico](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fn3i1g1bie3wt3fpu4t8p/12.-Aprendizaje-no-supervisado-Jer-rquico.pptx?rlkey=377aqcddi3rijuxpl1spac07o&dl=1)<br>
[3. Modelo DBScan-DataQuest](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9jz25miglmpfeku7hjdtr/Agrupamiento_DBSCAN.pptx?rlkey=uanpdb709c457sndhga18px1j&dl=1)<br>


  </td>

  <td>
  

 
 **PlayGrounds**<br>

 
[0. Simple Classifiers (U SanDiego)](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/classify.html)<br>
[1. ML-PlayGround](https://ml-playground.com/#)<br>
[3. Applet Interactivo k-means](https://kmeans.js.org/en/)<br>

**PlayGrounds Personales**<br>
[1. Clasificador Logistica-Arboles-Bosque](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/mgvf1zp1aeozz3rhuhanl/ClasificadorRegLog-Arboles-Forest-Def.html?rlkey=1uuafvk8lh0a9ad3gmfipw5oe&dl=1)<br>
[2. Clasificador SVM](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9a004y3oxbu9s2nuz4kk8/Excelente-SVM-Definitivo.html?rlkey=6uloii3co9e0pft46j31bvfdg&dl=1)<br>
[3. Clasificador SVM-KNN-Bayes](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ubpidlwdd0im9lul9jbg4/classifier_offline_svm_knn_gnb_csvfix.html?rlkey=9zun0n0bmghgojtys40ro2iig&dl=1)<br>
[4. Simulador K-Means](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/bf107kl0p7qq3g6zqc1ds/kmeans_2d_offline.html?rlkey=qx822kzk1e7ca64p1oarb2z29&dl=1)<br>
**Datos**<br>
[1. Para Clasificadores Supervisados](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/50u490fq5dx90qpuihiqe/EjEntrenamientoSVM.zip?rlkey=dmmu9xn75vk75vb50ykjoaqkh&dl=1)<br>
[2. Para K-Means](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/xmwfb0fx79xeajn6k2cv1/DatosCSV.zip?rlkey=mdedlpqvw7oy19hupb0dl0qut&dl=1)<br>



 

 </td>

<td>
**Aprendizaje no Supervisado**<br>


[1. Andrew Ng Unsupervised Learning 15 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qj5ltrAFric)<br>

 </tr>

 <th>Sesión 3 : 1 de Diciembre</th>


  <td>

  **Aprendizaje no Supervisado** <br><br>
   </td>

<td>


**Modelos No Supervisados Avanzados**<br>

**Factorización de Matrices**<br>
[Sistema de recomendación de Netflix](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/5q7gxxu4f708xf41eagmq/Netflix_Recommendation_System.pptx?rlkey=410lle7sjm0nht3wtykum5w3r&dl=1)<br>
**Analisis de Componentes Principales**<br>
[Reducción Dimensionalidad](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/iygtvktiirkc4we347rcm/PrinCompAnalysis.pptx?rlkey=hs4z7skfnu0txbrvdsuee931e&dl=1)<br>

  </td>

  <td>
  
**Para Comenzar: Lectura y Video**<br>
[AutomatizaPro Carlos Martínez ICADE](https://www.automatizapro.com.ar/blog/aprendizaje-supervisado-no-supervisado-refuerzo/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)<br>

**Curso**<br>
[Google ML Excelente](https://developers.google.com/machine-learning/crash-course?hl=es-419)<br>
[PlayGround regression](https://developers.google.com/machine-learning/crash-course/linear-regression/parameters-exercise?hl=es-419)<br>
[PlayGround Gradient Descent](https://developers.google.com/machine-learning/crash-course/linear-regression/gradient-descent-exercise?hl=es-419)<br>
**Canal Youtube**<br>
[Welch Labs](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UConVfxXodg78Tzh5nNu85Ew)<br>
[Demistified neural nets](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bxe2T-V8XRs&list=PLiaHhY2iBX9hdHaRr6b7XevZtgZRa1PoU)<br>


  </td>

<td>


**Artículos de Investigación ML**<br>

[Casos Reales](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/mucw5kc6gdjr1o88w3bzd/ArticulosCasosrealesML.zip?rlkey=trk25yf5c8l1symi2vbj0ictk&dl=1)<br>

**Videos:**<br>

**No supervisados**<br>



[1. K-means Clustering](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4b5d3muPQmA&t=105s)<br>
[2. Hierarchical Clustering](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7xHsRkOdVwo)<br>
[3. Matrix Factorization](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZspR5PZemcs&t=2s)<br>



 </td>

 </tr>


 <th>Sesión 3 : 1 de Diciembre</th>


  <td>

 **Evaluación de Modelos de ML**
   </td>

<td>

**Cómo medir y evaluar un modelo de ML**<br>

[1. Evaluando el Desempeño-DataCamp](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/b176fe2jwov45c2fzj4tk/1.-Evaluating-Performance-DataCamp.pptx?rlkey=nzcq6vivch5vb1b4vpsne26eb&dl=1)<br>
[2. La Matriz de Confusión DataQuest](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/7lmbeif60l8q4ai9ikt3s/2.-Stat-Quest-ConfMatrix.pptx?rlkey=384g7cww11vta9bvnftufk9u7&dl=1)<br>
[3. Types-of-Errors-Complexity-Graph](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/uniqe1nr5p5aofeo1xm68/3.-Types-Of-Errors-Complexity-Graph.pptx?rlkey=rhpxb6jip4ethctikrniwfq5g&dl=1)<br>
[4. Testing and Error Metrics](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/94a29b5plj97n1uont74x/4.-Testing-and-Error-Metrics.pptx?rlkey=4czqoo0v9gjyth3fjspf2n76u&dl=1)<br>
[5. ROC](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/u565828ub4dpna2vdezvm/5.-ROC_Feito.pptx?rlkey=avjlhdr10oij4556pzc861o5o&dl=1)<br>
[6. Summary](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/p9ophic9tdgxxv3drxkkc/6.-Summary.pptx?rlkey=oedh3z41dtz1d299wf7dy56gg&dl=1)<br>

**Videos**<br>

[Video: Cross Validation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fSytzGwwBVw)<br>
[Video: Bias and variance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EuBBz3bI-aA&t=66s)<br>
[Video: Regularization](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q81RR3yKn30)<br>
[Video: Boosting](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GM3CDQfQ4sw)<br>
[Video: RLearning Sutton  Excelente](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ggqnxyjaKe4&t=6432s)<br>
</td>

  <td>
  
**Lecturas**<br>
[1.Como evaluar el desempeño de un modelo de ML](https://towardsdatascience.com/how-to-evaluate-the-performance-of-your-ml-ai-models-ba1debc6f2fa/)<br>
[2. Evaluación y selección de Modelos (Neptune.ai)](https://neptune.ai/blog/ml-model-evaluation-and-selection)<br>
[3.Técnicas de Evaluación de Modelos de ML](https://medium.com/@fatmanurkutlu1/model-evaluation-techniques-in-machine-learning-8cd88deb8655)<br>
 
 </td>


<td>
**Videos:**<br>
[1. ML Testing and Error Metrics](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aDW44NPhNw0&t=3s)<br>
[2.ROC Curve in 10 minutes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z5qA9qZMyw0&t=8s)<br>
[3. How to evaluate ML Models 10 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LbX4X71-TFI)<br>
[4. StatQuest the Confusion Matrix](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kdsp6soqA7o)<br>
    
  
 </td>
 
 <br><br><br>
 
 
 
 </tr>
 
 <th>Material Adicional</th>


  <td>

 **Reinforcement y Deep  Learning**<br>


   </td>

<td>

[Redes Neuronales y Aprendizaje-Serrano](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sdg71qkhi38zw2575zmb9/3.-Redes_Neuronales_y_Aprendizaje.pptx?rlkey=98nl1p8521311k8eorkv0e7an&dl=1)<br>
[Deep Learning-DataCamp](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/p2pgep553aodxdtphrqph/Deep-Learning.pptx?rlkey=mn1rhkjqa1fpbs8gigiculiwl&dl=1)<br>

[1. Aprendizaje por Refuerzo Fundamentos y Desafios](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/xgvzp4xkk066xil9wmtpb/Aprendizaje-por-Refuerzo-Fundamentos-y-Desafios-1.pptx?rlkey=hig1o4sawijidb1s4169exxdx&dl=1)<br>
[2.Recompensas para Robots(Mitchell)](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/vsvie5ski5l98ifgxbz91/1.-Recompensas-para-Robots-Mitchell.pptx?rlkey=pw27vff88s9fk7z5qygewxyc2&dl=1)<br>
[3. Más alla de los Juegos el RL en IA](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/5flitkpcjunbsonqv8vaw/2.-Mas-Alla-de-los-Juegos-El-Aprendizaje-por-Refuerzo-en-IA.pptx?rlkey=e98u95t2m3ee8hnnoq35j1ab7&dl=1)<br>



  </td>

  <td>
  
  
[Excelente blog Intro to RL](https://www.analyticsvidhya.com/blog/2017/01/introduction-to-reinforcement-learning-implementation/)<br>
[Resources of RL gitHub](https://github.com/aikorea/awesome-rl)<br>
[Karpathy RL Demo](https://cs.stanford.edu/people/karpathy/convnetjs/demo/rldemo.html)<br>
[Karpathy Playground](https://cs.stanford.edu/people/karpathy/reinforcejs/)<br>


**Teachable Machine**<br>

[Enlace a Entrenamiento MNIST](https://teachablemachine.withgoogle.com/models/zyB8EczEV/)<br>
[Video Yann Lecun 1 min](https://www.google.com/search?q=yann+lecun+mnist+video&sca_esv=2fdb4996cfdf24b0&sxsrf=AE3TifM_zwRGJkY7sNLizK9w4-AiWU8cTQ%3A1756246770861&ei=8jKuaNecNMuTwbkP8MSBSA&ved=0ahUKEwjX3aiHwamPAxXLSTABHXBiAAkQ4dUDCBA&uact=5&oq=yann+lecun+mnist+video&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiFnlhbm4gbGVjdW4gbW5pc3QgdmlkZW8yBRAhGKABMgUQIRigAUi1C1CEAljjCXABeAGQAQCYAZcBoAGHBqoBAzAuNrgBA8gBAPgBAZgCB6ACngbCAgoQABiwAxjWBBhHwgINEC4YgAQYsAMYQxiKBcICCBAAGIAEGMsBwgIGEAAYFhgewgIEECEYFZgDAIgGAZAGCZIHAzEuNqAHuheyBwMwLja4B5gGwgcFMC41LjLIBw8&sclient=gws-wiz-serp#fpstate=ive&vld=cid:c3a1872f,vid:FwFduRA_L6Q,st:0)<br>


       
 </td>

<td>

**Videos**<br>

**Reinforcement Learning**<br>

[Video Brief Intro to RL](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m2weFARriE8&t=216s)<br>

[DeepMind Playing Space Invaders](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W2CAghUiofY)<br>

 </tr>
 
 
 
 
 </table>
 
 <br><br><br>


## Semana 3



<!-- ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ye3ifl3x66amuti85v1mb/noBias.gif?rlkey=axjarehgwzviznfbv8dijd1me&dl=1){width=30%} ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/q72ehk3urudzshkx1gygp/Bias.gif?rlkey=qq3hh33scxgwtd0gbfmjjecon&dl=1){width=30%} ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/0g8oeyo6aynq8xp8n3caz/BiasWithAdamOptimizer.gif?rlkey=5zht65bl8erzpcy0nztkjau82&dl=1){width=30%} -->

</td>

<table border="1">
 <tr> 
    <th> </th>
    <th>Descripción</th>
    <th>Diapositivas</th>
    <th> Lecturas y Talleres</th>
    <th> Material Adicional</th>
  </tr>
  
 <tr>
 

<th>**Sesión 1: 3 de Diciembre** </th>


 <td> **Introducción al Deep Learning Parte Uno** <br></br>
       
     
 </td>
    
<td>

**Introducción**<br>
[Introducción al Deep Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tbw0ol1cspalh0dnjdi28/Introducci-n-al-Deep-Learning-Aprendizaje-Profundo.pptx?rlkey=wc2mfv5du5dryny96ucpr1krv&dl=1)<br>

**Video Introductorio**<br>
[Pasado, Presente y futuro del DL(dot.csv)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yAF3bopYMGk)<br>
[Slides Video](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/r9mrxerokuayepnj4ezfg/SlidesVideoDeepLearning1-0-3-0.pptx?rlkey=uazsey1d9fdgqbvyg5vmne0o7&dl=1)<br>


</td>

<td>

**Lecturas**<br>

[1. Bishop 2024 Deep Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/jm2ywgo1wqqewy2cycit2/Bishop2024DeepLearningEsp.pdf?rlkey=nrnt87kcc3q22zip0lnc9ovh9&dl=1)<br>
[2. Alpaydin 2019 Deep Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/iu8n5pl7r85iitfoybj1h/AlpaydinDeepLearning.pdf?rlkey=pgko5aqvrl1u0tw4r21m0mfw3&dl=1)<br>
[!!! OJO Quizizz Lecturas!!!](https://wayground.com/join?gc=914499)<br>


**Videos Hitos**<br>


[Veritasium Historia del Perceptrón 3:45-8:10](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVsUOuSjvcg)<br>
[Driveless car Sebastian Thurn 4 min ](https://www.ted.com/talks/sebastian_thrun_google_s_driverless_car?language=es&subtitle=es)
[AlphaFold dot.csv](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uz7ucmqjZ08)<br>
[GANs Luis Serrano](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HACn6OU_y5I&list=PLvtKzIJHlUuGjNAIDukH-h9alFvjtBy7P&index=8)<br>
[Playing Atari BreakOut RL](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1eYniJ0Rnk)
[AlphaGo Trailer 2 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8tq1C8spV_g)
[Alpha Go Zero David Silver](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXHFqTvfFSw)


 **Lecturas Artículos Claves (NotebookLM)**<br>
 
 [Artículo 1 2015](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/y0s9dtbbz6n2w6v2eikay/Art-culoBengioLecunHinton2015RevistaNature.pdf?rlkey=rmuxze022gy8etpsberqa30lo&dl=1)<br>
 [Artículo 2  2017 ](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/uf4jzfr73w44frspbhc84/AttentionIsAllyouNeed.pdf?rlkey=9blryx30buhm1werbfe55lgm7&dl=1)<br>

**Adicional Blog Interactivo**<br>
[ What is a neural Network:   3 Capítulos](https://codefinity.com/courses/v2/f9fc718f-c98b-470d-ba78-d84ef16ba45f/00f9f494-73bd-443a-826a-3f89d7d8eae8/54ebc8a5-ae6d-422c-86b9-0523ecb849a4?gclid=Cj0KCQjwpvK4BhDUARIsADHt9sTyrtNpwefd4iDZKv6rvVvtoH2uyqkYEIv92GOBZZEfjxF6pSGK6dAaArH_EALw_wcB)<br>
 


</td>
       
 <td> 
 
 **Personaje:**<br>
 **Yann Lecun**<br>
[1.Yann Lecun: Paris Conversations Reflections of an AI Visionary Agosto 2025](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l3Emh_cekZo&t=907s)<br>
[2.Video 1989: The First Conv Neural network MNIST](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FwFduRA_L6Q)<br>
[3. Yann Lecun: Primera Clase ,New York University ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0bMe_vCZo30&list=PL80I41oVxglKcAHllsU0txr3OuTTaWX2v)<br>
[4. Self Supervised Lerning the dark matter of intelligence, 10 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JNiY0RXxFZY)<br>


**Canal 3Blue1Brown**<br>

[1. But What is a Neural network?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aircAruvnKk&list=PLZHQObOWTQDNU6R1_67000Dx_ZCJB-3pi&index=1)<br>
[2.Gradient descent, how neural networks learn  ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IHZwWFHWa-w&list=PLZHQObOWTQDNU6R1_67000Dx_ZCJB-3pi&index=2)<br>
[3. What is backpropagation really doing? ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ilg3gGewQ5U&list=PLZHQObOWTQDNU6R1_67000Dx_ZCJB-3pi&index=3)<br>


 


 
 
**Videos Cortos**<br>

[1. Deep Learning Mapa Conceptual en Español : 7 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KytW151dpqU)<br>
[2. RSA What is Deep Learning](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6M5VXKLf4D4&t=13s)<br>


**Excelente Curso Online**<br>
[ Mit Deep Learning ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ErnWZxJovaM&list=PLtBw6njQRU-rwp5__7C0oIVt26ZgjG9NI)<br>


   
 </td>
 
 </tr>
 
 <th>Sesión 1 : 3 de Diciembre</th>
 
 
  <td>**Introducción al Deep learning Parte Dos**<br><br>

    
   </td>
    
<td>

**Slides**<br>
[0. Breve Historia del Deep learning Terrence Sejnowski](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9ke8i50tcuxunlz6jz6g6/La-Revolucion-del-Aprendizaje-Profundo-Sejnowski.pptx?rlkey=6j6ymhp3w1nzhfm5harhmbh34&dl=1)<br>

[1. Repaso Clasificación y regresión](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2ahzkwwsow05xe6pm5n6k/2.Clasificaci-n-Regresi-n.pptx?rlkey=bt4oj5wbkak2xghx5oobiw85b&dl=1)<br>
[2. Redes neuronales y  Aprendizaje Luis Serrano](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/uxanooskrfp5a0aok8v9n/3.-Redes_Neuronales_y_Aprendizaje.pptx?rlkey=ldr8kiw5ao25tevqx6sb1afka&dl=1)<br>



**Cómo aprenden las redes neuronales Parte Uno (Dot.csv)**<br>
[1.Qué es una red neuronal? ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uwbHOpp9xkc&list=PL-Ogd76BhmcB9OjPucsnc2-piEE96jJDQ&index=2)<br>
[2.Propagando los errores backPropagation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eNIqz_noix8&list=PL-Ogd76BhmcB9OjPucsnc2-piEE96jJDQ&index=4)<br>
[3.Optimización Gradient Descent](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MRIv2IwFTPg)<br>
[Opcional: Aprender a Programar una red neuronal](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qTNUbPkR2ao&list=PL-Ogd76BhmcB9OjPucsnc2-piEE96jJDQ&index=6)<br>

**Cómo aprenden las redes neuronales Parte Dos(3Blue1Brown)**<br>

[1. Qué es una red neuronal? (18 min)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aircAruvnKk&t=1s)<br>
[2.Descenso de Gradiente  ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mwHiaTrQOiI)<br>
[Opcional Back Propagation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ScVpPS_CFYc)<br>


        
  </td>
  
  <td>
  

**Taller TensorFlow PlayGround**<br>

[1. Video Jugando con redes Neuronales](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FVozZVUNOOA)<br>
**PlayGrounds**<br>
[1. Sitio Oficial TensorFlow PlayGround](https://playground.tensorflow.org/#activation=tanh&batchSize=10&dataset=circle&regDataset=reg-plane&learningRate=0.03&regularizationRate=0&noise=0&networkShape=4,2&seed=0.84976&showTestData=false&discretize=false&percTrainData=50&x=true&y=true&xTimesY=false&xSquared=false&ySquared=false&cosX=false&sinX=false&cosY=false&sinY=false&collectStats=false&problem=classification&initZero=false&hideText=false)<br>
[2. Playground Carnegie Mellon](https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~pvirtue/tfp/#activation=relu&batchSize=10&dataset=circle&regDataset=reg-saw&learningRate=0.03&regularizationRate=0&noise=0&networkShape=4,2&seed=0.49562&showTestData=false&discretize=true&percTrainData=50&x=true&collectStats=false&problem=regression&initZero=false&hideText=false)<br>

[3. Playground que permite subir datos](https://playground.scienxlab.org/?utm_source=chatgpt.com#activation=sigmoid&batchSize=10&dataset=circle&regDataset=reg-plane&learningRate=0.03&regularizationRate=0.01&errorFunc=square&problem=classification&noise=0&networkShape=4&seed=0.16904&showTestData=false&discretize=false&percTrainData=50&x=true&y=true&xTimesY=false&xSquared=false&ySquared=false&collectStats=false&initZero=false&hideText=false)<br>
[4 Deeper Playground con muchos datasets](https://deeperplayground.org/?utm_source=chatgpt.com#activation=tanh&regularization=L2&batchSize=10&dataset=circle&regDataset=reg-plane&learningRate=0.03&regularizationRate=0&noise=0&networkShape=4,2&seed=0.48861&showTestData=false&discretize=false&percTrainData=50&x=true&y=true&xTimesY=false&xSquared=false&ySquared=false&cosX=false&sinX=false&cosY=false&sinY=false&collectStats=false&problem=classification&initZero=false&hideText=false&animationSpeed=100&layerwiseGradientNormalization=0&learningRateAutotuning=-1&preventLossIncreases=false&dropout=0&momentum=0)<br>

[5. Excellent Numerical Playground](https://akarzazi.github.io/neural-network-playground/)<br>


[Otro video TensorFlow Playground 34 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=WvE4vF4tfrU)<br>


**¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Tarea!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!**<br>
[3.  Playground que permite subir datos](https://playground.scienxlab.org/?utm_source=chatgpt.com#activation=sigmoid&batchSize=10&dataset=circle&regDataset=reg-plane&learningRate=0.03&regularizationRate=0.01&errorFunc=square&problem=classification&noise=0&networkShape=4&seed=0.16904&showTestData=false&discretize=false&percTrainData=50&x=true&y=true&xTimesY=false&xSquared=false&ySquared=false&collectStats=false&initZero=false&hideText=false
)<br>

[4. Otro Playground Redes Neuronales San Diego](https://www.ccom.ucsd.edu/~cdeotte/programs/neuralnetwork.html)



**Aplicaciones deep learning**<br>
[1. NeuroVigill Site](https://www.neurovigil.com/)<br>
[1. NeuroVigil, iBrain Dr Philip Low](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AyCnDAqf8bI)<br>
[2. DeepStack WebSite](https://www.deepstack.ai/)<br>
[2. DeepStack Video](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/hTRQS4cq9z8)<br>
[3. Alphago site](https://deepmind.google/research/projects/alphago/)<br>
[3. AlphaGo The Movie Netflix](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXuK6gekU1Y)<br>


  
**Colab Notebook**<br>
[Programando una red neuronal desde cero](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W8AeOXa_FqU&list=PL-Ogd76BhmcCO4VeOlIH93BMT5A_kKAXp&index=4)<br>


  
   </td>
        
<td>

**Personaje:**<br>
**Geoffrey Hinton**<br>

 [Geoffrey Hinton: Primera Clase , University of Toronto  13 min ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OVwEeSsSCHE&list=PLLssT5z_DsK_gyrQ_biidwvPYCRNGI3iv)<br>
[Geoffrey Hinton: The Foundations of Deep Learning](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zl99IZvW7rE)<br>

**Videos Cortos Google:**<br>
[ Back Propagation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ovCyBmlrZGg)<br>
[Gradient Descent](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QoK1nNAURw4&list=PLOU2XLYxmsILTKLltkh859KJ9BizDvd_S&index=2)<br>

**Mini Cursos Redes Neuronales**<br>

[1. Canal  3blue1Brown en Español (3 videos)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jKCQsndqEGQ&list=PLIb_io8a5NB0CP5ktJE9qaLd6GOfh1Z9m)<br>
[2. Canal Español dot.csv 3 Videos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MRIv2IwFTPg&list=PL-Ogd76BhmcB9OjPucsnc2-piEE96jJDQ)<br>

[1. El fin de las cajas negras? (Interpretability) (dot.csv)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VjZ51nIcy1I&t=187s)<br>
[ Why Deep learning works unreasonably well](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qx7hirqgfuU&t=1789s)<br>

**Canal Futurology**<br>

[1. Video:Deep Learning Explained](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pK9_ddD56J0&list=PLfsEr6YiELADCJ6TflLs0Um9PDg6QJ0_0&index=1)<br>
[2. Video: How to make a Neural network](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wieryfWkOl0&list=PLfsEr6YiELADCJ6TflLs0Um9PDg6QJ0_0&index=3)<br>
[3. Video: How Computers learn](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mb7bG9ABOLU&list=PLfsEr6YiELADCJ6TflLs0Um9PDg6QJ0_0&index=4)<br>
[4. Video: How neural Networks Work](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rJmBhnLzjOM&list=PLfsEr6YiELADCJ6TflLs0Um9PDg6QJ0_0&index=5)<br>

**PlayLists youTube**<br>
 [1. PlayList(Welch Labs) Neural Networks Demystified](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bxe2T-V8XRs&list=PLiaHhY2iBX9hdHaRr6b7XevZtgZRa1PoU)<br>
 [2. PlayList(StatQuest) Deep Learning](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLblh5JKOoLUIxGDQs4LFFD--41Vzf-ME1)<br>


  

 </td>
 
 </tr>
 
 
 
 
 
 
 <th>Sesión  2: 5 de Diciembre </th>
 
 
    <td><br><br>
    
**Procesamiento de Imágenes**<br>
**Redes Convolucionales**<br>
  
  
    
   </td>
    
<td>


 [1. Blog Interactivo ConvNets](https://ujjwalkarn.me/2016/08/11/intuitive-explanation-convnets/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)<br>


**Slides**<br>


[1. La Revolución de la Visión Artificial(Mitchell)](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/0g4zwau22dlk4n5hq580g/1.-La-Revolucion-de-la-Vision-Artificial.pptx?rlkey=yybnm4ucz72eaw90tnkzek054&dl=1)<br>
[2. Redes Convolucionales e ImageNet](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/cc347aayzunx6lwxf3o5m/2.-Redes-Convolucionales-e-ImageNet.pptx?rlkey=mwig810wawk6fpcsfy188bfhy&dl=1)<br>
[3. Conv neural Networks Serrano](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sb8gntyum5nkgwszub2qe/ConvolutionalNN.pptx?rlkey=b95ozmumta6k0iu999w40lyzb&dl=1)<br>
[4. Adversarial Examples](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/cvaxhwv7wrx20zcoc0srk/Ejemplos-Adversarios.pptx?rlkey=v6ly9sccoysct3sh7ntctn41l&dl=1)<br>


        
  </td>
  
  <td>
  
  
**Lecturas**<br>
**Libro Melanie Mitchell AI**<br>
[Cap 4 :Mirar y ver](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/2f5kk8uxkciatlhjvjwef/LecturaMitchellCap4MiraryVer.pdf?rlkey=l5i2u3e0x0qrpxpb3xxyoyjgi&dl=1)<br>
[Cap5 :ConvNets e imageNet](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/geiy44v2dviq0duunemcu/LecturaMitchellCap5ConvnetImageNet.pdf?rlkey=m6b5h8cwlj4inf686haqsjrgk&dl=1)<br>

**PlayGrounds**<br>

**Teachable Machine**<br>

[Primera versión 2017](https://teachablemachine.withgoogle.com/v1/)<br>
[0. Video Introductorio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3BhkeY974Rg&t=3s)
[Segunda versión](https://teachablemachine.withgoogle.com/)<br>
[0. Video Introductorio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T2qQGqZxkD0&t=43s)<br>

**Ejemplos**<br>
[1. Air Guitar](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oP8-_0ZyY3U)<br>
[2.Hand say Moo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LFHZtAasFXE)<br>


**CNN Explainer**<br>

[1. CNN Explainer](https://poloclub.github.io/cnn-explainer/)<br>
[1.1 Video CNn Explainer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HnWIHWFbuUQ)<br>
<!-- [0. Excelente Playgrounds para muchas Arquitecturas (PoloClub)](https://poloclub.github.io/ganlab/)<br> -->
[2. Adam Harley : Interactive CNN (MNIST)](https://adamharley.com/nn_vis/)<br>
[2.1 Video Explicativo Adam Harley 9 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dry5xxLRS-o)<br>

**Interactive Activities**<br>
[1. Excelente Quick Draw](https://quickdraw.withgoogle.com/)<br>
[2.  De Garabatos a Imágenes](https://mitmedialab.github.io/GAN-play/)<br>
[3. Pix to Pix Pikachu](https://yining1023.github.io/pix2pix_tensorflowjs_lite/)<br>
[4. PixToPix Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v3NBEwDakIlOuvU15nLBFSaoPdaJ3M6n-bVozMTGxWU/edit?usp=sharing)<br>
[5. Fast Style Transfer](https://yining1023.github.io/fast_style_transfer_in_ML5/)<br>

**Jupyter Notebook  **<br>
[Image Classification](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/bkw9g7y8008796t3obrvq/image_classification.ipynb?rlkey=nh8y8qvbjcw7ah24xvygm6txx&dl=1)<br>
[Enlace a Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/jamelende/JupyterNoteBooks/blob/main/DiplomadoIA/image_classification.ipynb)<br>

**Colab Notebook**<br>
[Ataques Adversarios Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JoQx39CoXW8&list=PL-Ogd76BhmcCO4VeOlIH93BMT5A_kKAXp&index=2)<br>



  
 </td>
        
<td>

**Personaje:**
**Fei Fei li**<br>

[Fei Fei li Ted Understanding Pictures 2015](https://www.ted.com/talks/fei_fei_li_how_we_re_teaching_computers_to_understand_pictures?subtitle=en&lng=es&geo=es)<br>
[Fei Fei li Ted spatial Intelligence 2024](https://www.ted.com/talks/fei_fei_li_with_spatial_intelligence_ai_will_understand_the_real_world?subtitle=en&lng=es&geo=es)<br>

**Videos:**<br>
[1. Redes Convolucionales : ¿Cómo funcionan? (dot.csv)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V8j1oENVz00&t=236s)<br>
[1.1 Audio NotebookLM el Video](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/wxl72z6t6a5x5z8turuah/CNNs__C-mo_las_M-quinas__Ven__el_Mundo_y_la_Revoluci-n_de_la_IA.m4a?rlkey=vemcbk2ibfluqmn99eqlmowey&dl=1)<br>
[2. Video: Convolutional Neural networks Explained, Futurology](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pj9-rr1wDhM&t=133s)<br>
[3. What is Spatial Intelligence (Notebook LM)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iwyVvlOkcO0)<br>
[4. Joseph Redmon How computers  learn to recognize Objects 2017](https://www.ted.com/talks/joseph_redmon_how_computers_learn_to_recognize_objects_instantly?subtitle=en&lng=es&geo=es)<br>


 </td>
 
 </tr>
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 <th>Sesión 2 : 5 de Diciembre </th>
 
 
  <td>
  <br><br>

**Embeddings**<br>



   </td>
    
<td>

**Videos antes de Slides**<br>

[1. La siguiente gran Revolución: NLP](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cTQiN9dewIg)<br>

  </td>
  
  <td>
  
  
  
**Artículos **<br>

[ Andrew Ng Natural Language Processing](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/p8tw2pmk40jee6d8kvu05/NLP-Andrew-Ng.pdf?rlkey=hdvyqsnovaen93ugjs29uslvl&dl=1)<br>

 <th>Sesión 3: 10 de Diciembre  </th>
 
 
  <td>

 <th>Sesión 3 : 10 de Diciembre</th>
 
 
  <td>
  
**Deep Reinforcement Learning**<br>


  



    
    
   </td>
    
<td>

**Videos**<br>
[1. AlphaGo - The Movie | Full award-winning documentary](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXuK6gekU1Y)<br>
[2. AlphaZero: Shedding new light on the grand games of chess, shogi and Go](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7L2sUGcOgh0)<br>
[3. AlphaGo Zero: Discovering new knowledge 3 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXHFqTvfFSw&t=22s)
[4. MuZero: DeepMind’s New AI Mastered More Than 50 Games (5 min)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hYV4-m7_SK8)<br>
[5.Google DeepMind's Deep Q-Learning & Superhuman Atari Gameplays](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ih8EfvOzBOY)<br>
[6. How DeepSeek Rewrote the Transformer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0VLAoVGf_74)<br>
[7. BreakOut 1 min](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TmPfTpjtdgg&t=5s)<br>
[8.How Did TD-Gammon Learn? - The Board Game Xpert (3:30 min)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qN9Sn7f2kaw)<br>
[9. 1952 Arthur Samuel: Forgotten Computer Science Pioneer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t0sSFFs5jAw&t=5s)<br>
[10. Reinforcement Learning: A 60 Year History](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dov68JsIC4g)<br>



**Slides**<br>

**Mitchell**<br>

[1. Aprendizaje por Refuerzo Fundamentos y Desafios](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/xgvzp4xkk066xil9wmtpb/Aprendizaje-por-Refuerzo-Fundamentos-y-Desafios-1.pptx?rlkey=hig1o4sawijidb1s4169exxdx&dl=1)<br>
[2.Recompensas para Robots(Mitchell)](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/vsvie5ski5l98ifgxbz91/1.-Recompensas-para-Robots-Mitchell.pptx?rlkey=pw27vff88s9fk7z5qygewxyc2&dl=1)<br>
[3. Más alla de los Juegos el RL en IA](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/5flitkpcjunbsonqv8vaw/2.-Mas-Alla-de-los-Juegos-El-Aprendizaje-por-Refuerzo-en-IA.pptx?rlkey=e98u95t2m3ee8hnnoq35j1ab7&dl=1)<br>

**Serrano**<br>

[1. Slides Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/j3g2l899dvlssb9k8fi99/3.-Slides-Deep-Reinforcement-Learning-Serrano.pptx?rlkey=k9pdbb0w3npxqob2a3vzjadxo&dl=1)<br>
[2. Slides RL with Human feedback](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/rjzbzx6kqq8vyx6egqb8o/4.-Slides-Reinforcement-Learning-With-Human-Feddback-Serrano.pptx?rlkey=wv46leg596q353d1kuhq6wze5&dl=1)<br>
[2.1 Video RL With Human Feedback ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AS4efwOypjU)<br>
[3.Slides Proximal Policy Optimization  ](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/j8ca2uyklqsji377mq5b3/5.-Slides-Proximal-Policy-Optimization.pptx?rlkey=0vdzyucpb876i8dn55q3tgb9q&dl=1)<br>
[3.1 Video  Proximal Policy Optimization](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TjHH_--7l8g&list=PLs8w1Cdi-zvYviYYw_V3qe6SINReGF5M-&index=2)<br>
[4. ¡¡¡Excelente!!! How Deep Seek trains reasoning models](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XeUB4h1OO1g)<br>
    


  </td>

  <td>
  
**Lecturas:**<br>

[-1 Guía para principiantes sobre el aprendizaje por refuerzo ](https://medium.com/analytics-vidhya/a-beginners-guide-to-reinforcement-learning-and-its-basic-implementation-from-scratch-2c0b5444cc49)<br>

[0.How reinforcement learning improves DeepSeek performance](https://developers.redhat.com/articles/2025/04/29/how-reinforcement-learning-improves-deepseek-performance?utm_source=chatgpt.com#how_deepseek_r1_was_created)

[1. Aprendizaje por Refuerzo: Una introducción con ejemplos en Python](https://www.datacamp.com/es/tutorial/reinforcement-learning-python-introduction)<br>
[1.1 Doc word con Respuestas al Final](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/llri764ecpx5sm2zvtayq/Respuestas_lectura_Aprendizaje_Por_Refuerzo-Alfinal.docx?rlkey=1ungtq0l704968zxh7bo7o4ws&dl=1)<br>
[1.2 Enlace a Quizizz](https://wayground.com/join?gc=552911)<br>

[2. Una introducción suave al aprendizaje por refuerzo profundo](https://towardsdatascience.com/drl-01-a-gentle-introduction-to-deep-reinforcement-learning-405b79866bf4/)<br>
[2.1 Slides respuestas a preguntas](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/exd3l9qxcbatsdta3pzcf/Respuestas-Art-culo-RLearning.pptx?rlkey=n4sw024k5rd2qqadxsd2nihgp&dl=1)<br>
[2.2 enlace Quizizz](https://wayground.com/join?gc=126414)<br>

[3. Lectura Adicional  Aprendizaje por Refuerzo Blog en Español](https://www.aprendemachinelearning.com/aprendizaje-por-refuerzo/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)<br>



[3. Artículo Clave David Silver Alpha Zero](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/llt4h0foiuh400sldk7nd/SilverAlphaZero.pdf?rlkey=s6yn8wwuxx7rvl7cng7lhalo3&dl=1)<br>
[Perturbations](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sp1ta4mpfcbdv1wsp2sl5/Perturbations.pdf?rlkey=iq2nd57cdoet4acyyq85ci4ix&dl=1)<br>
[Excelente blog Intro to RL](https://www.analyticsvidhya.com/blog/2017/01/introduction-to-reinforcement-learning-implementation/)<br>


**PlayGrounds RL**<br>

[1. Beginners RL](https://awjuliani.github.io/web-rl-playground/)<br>
[1.1 Artículo Explicativo Medium](https://awjuliani.medium.com/the-beginners-rl-playground-a-simple-interactive-website-for-grokking-reinforcement-learning-b6f1edcf7c63)<br>
[2. Playground a la TensorFlow](https://alazareva.github.io/rl_playground/#agentType=expectedSarsa&learningRate=0.5&epsilon=0.05&discount=0.9&showVisits=true&showQ=true)<br>
[3. Raise MIT Programable](https://playground.raise.mit.edu/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)<br>

[Karpathy RL Demo](https://cs.stanford.edu/people/karpathy/convnetjs/demo/rldemo.html)<br>
[Karpathy Playground](https://cs.stanford.edu/people/karpathy/reinforcejs/)<br>
  
 </td>
        
<td>
**Personaje**<br>
**Seabastian Thrun **<br>

[1. Video Sebastian Thurn TED 2011](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HW3q6ktpQXA&t=124s)<br>



**Videos**<br>

 </tr>
 
 <th>Material Adicional </th>


  <td>

  **La ética y el futuro de  la IA**<br>

   </td>

<td>

**16 Articulos Cortos**<br>

[1. Depresión](https://es.wired.com/articulos/detectar-depresion-con-solo-mirar-smartphone-potencial-de-nuevas-tecnologias)<br>
[2. Funeraria](https://es.wired.com/articulos/esta-funeraria-usa-ia-para-darle-vida-a-las-fotos-de-tus-familiares-fallecidos)<br>
[3. Lenguaje de Señas](https://es.wired.com/articulos/traducir-el-lenguaje-de-senas-la-ia-como-ingrediente-de-una-sociedad-inclusiva)<br>
[4. Testigos de un Crimen](https://es.wired.com/articulos/que-ocurre-cuando-se-usa-ia-para-interrogar-a-testigos-de-crimen)<br>
[5. Malas Notas en Colegio](https://es.wired.com/articulos/un-nino-recibe-una-mala-nota-por-usar-ia-y-sus-padres-demandan-al-colegio)<br>
[6. Los Animales Hablan](https://es.wired.com/articulos/los-animales-hablan-gracias-a-la-ia-en-el-museo-de-zoologia-de-cambridge)<br>
[7. 160 mil nuevos virus](https://es.wired.com/articulos/descubren-mas-de-160-mil-nuevos-virus-con-ayuda-de-la-ia)<br>
[8. Zoom se llena de IA](https://es.wired.com/articulos/zoom-se-llena-de-ia-pronto-podras-tener-avatares-realistas-que-salgan-a-camara-por-ti)<br>
[9. IA y las armas](https://es.wired.com/articulos/trae-stephens-ha-construido-armas-ia-y-ha-trabajado-para-donald-trump-jesucristo-lo-aprobaria-asegura)<br>
[10. Confiabilidad de los chatbots](https://es.wired.com/articulos/entre-mas-grandes-y-poderosos-se-hacen-los-chatbots-menos-confiables-se-vuelven)<br>
[11. La Ia y la seguridad Juegos Olímpicos 2024](https://es.wired.com/articulos/inteligencia-artificial-nueva-policia-de-juegos-olimpicos-de-paris-2024)<br>
[12. Los juegos Olimpicos y la IA](https://es.wired.com/articulos/juegos-olimpicos-paris-2024-primeros-era-de-inteligencia-artificial)<br>
[13. El futuro de la progamación](https://es.wired.com/articulos/futuro-de-programacion-impulsada-por-ia-esta-cerca)<br>
[14. la Ia y el humor](https://es.wired.com/articulos/chatgpt-ya-puede-hacernos-reir-mas-que-un-humano-segun-un-estudio)<br>
[15. La IA y la empatía](https://es.wired.com/articulos/empatia-programada-el-futuro-de-la-interaccion-humano-maquina)<br>
[16. La IA y la atención al cliente](https://es.wired.com/articulos/yalo-la-startup-que-ofrece-conversaciones-ia-entre-empresas-y-clientes)<br>

</td>

<td>

**Otros 16 Articulos Cortos**<br>

[1. Oracle y la medicina](https://es.wired.com/articulos/oracle-y-el-avance-de-la-medicina-en-la-era-de-la-ia)<br>
[2. IA y gestión de Proyectos](https://es.wired.com/articulos/la-ia-quiere-innovar-la-gestion-de-proyectos-para-equipos-de-trabajo)<br>
[3. La energía y la IA](https://es.wired.com/articulos/la-cantidad-de-agua-y-electricidad-que-usa-chatgpt-esta-fuera-de-control)<br>
[4. La IA y el calor](https://es.wired.com/articulos/ia-genera-tanto-calor-que-paris-lo-usa-para-templar-alberca-olimpica)<br>
[5. La IA y la cocina](https://es.wired.com/articulos/un-asistente-en-tu-cocina-llamado-ia)<br>
[6. IA Honesta Transparente y Responsable](https://es.wired.com/articulos/como-logramos-una-ia-mas-honesta-transparente-y-responsable)<br>
[7. La IA y las reuniones](https://es.wired.com/articulos/este-dispositivo-digital-con-ia-registrara-tus-reuniones-y-quiza-tu-vida)<br>
[8. IA y política](https://es.wired.com/articulos/trump-comparte-imagenes-falsas-de-taylor-swift-creadas-con-ia-para-reclutar-votantes)<br>
[9. La Ia y las promesas del fútbol](https://es.wired.com/articulos/ia-cambiando-forma-descubrir-nuevas-promesas-futbol)<br>
[10. IA y el VAR](https://es.wired.com/articulos/trump-comparte-imagenes-falsas-de-taylor-swift-creadas-con-ia-para-reclutar-votantes)<br>
[11.IA y el cine](https://es.wired.com/articulos/mike-rianda-hizo-una-pelicula-sobre-humanos-que-se-rebelan-contra-la-ia-ahora-se-hace-realidad)<br>
[12. IA y la Ingeniería](https://es.wired.com/articulos/mike-rianda-hizo-una-pelicula-sobre-humanos-que-se-rebelan-contra-la-ia-ahora-se-hace-realidad)<br>
[13. IA y los juegos de mesa](https://es.wired.com/articulos/prompting-asi-es-disenar-un-juego-de-mesa-en-familia-con-ia)<br>
[14. La IA y la ciberdelincuencia](https://es.wired.com/articulos/ia-es-arma-seductora-para-ciberdelincuentes-pero-puede-escaparse-de-sus-manos)<br>
[15.Melanie Mitchell ¿Cómo los grandes modelos lingüísticos dan sentido a sus “mundos”? Parte Uno](https://aiguide.substack.com/p/llms-and-world-models-part-1)<br>
[16. Melanie Mitchell ¿Cómo los grandes modelos lingüísticos dan sentido a sus “mundos”? Parte Dos](https://aiguide.substack.com/p/llms-and-world-models-part-2)<br>
</td>

<td>

**Videos para Discusión**<br>

<!-- [1.Melanie Mitchell Presents "The Future of Artificial Intelligence"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V95W9g-SsBU&t=1s)<br> -->
[1. Sal Khan How AI Could Save (Not Destroy) Education](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hJP5GqnTrNo)<br>

[2. An Imminent Threat from Artificial Intelligence  Aidan Gomez](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s0rwZXt-C04&t=531s)<br>
[3. AI Is Dangerous, but Not for the Reasons You Think Sasha Luccioni](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eXdVDhOGqoE&t=39s)<br>
[4. The Catastrophic Risks of AI — and a Safer Path | Yoshua Bengio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qe9QSCF-d88)<br>
[5. Demis Hassabis On The Future of Work in the Age of AI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CRraHg4Ks_g)<br>
[6. AI and our future with Yuval Noah Harari and Mustafa Suleyman](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b2uEAgLeOzA)<br>
[7. 'We have to stop it taking over' - the past, present and future of AI with Geoffrey Hinton](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y7nrAOmUtRs)<br>



 </td>
 
 </tr>
 
 
 
 </table>

# Recursos de apoyo

## Libros

<center> ![](https://github.com/jamelende/PaginasWeb/raw/main/Libros.jpg){width=20%} </center>

**Módulo 2**<br>


[Machine Learning is fun ebook](https://www.machinelearningisfun.com/)<br>
[Machine Learning Mit Press 2022](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/iymjn5mxinvjr35r6x8tc/1.-Ethem-Alpaydin-Machine-Learning-The-MIT-Press-2021.pdf?rlkey=41dcahrj5cjhqojrkimvs6x2l&dl=1)<br>
[AI: A guide to Thinking Humans](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dvxw3a593prfnwljfn9zs/Melanie-Mitchell-Artificial-Intelligence_-A-Guide-for-Thinking-Humans-Farrar-Straus-and-Giroux-2019.pdf?rlkey=haxmo9jn1ecc0sogdp3dtrwza&dl=1)<br>
[ Luis Serrano Grokking Machine Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/cnvu0aguzx5a6oczgpa0d/2.-Grokking-Machine-Learning-Serrano.pdf?rlkey=5m1otas2x042rqd14jhacma6a&dl=1)<br>



**AI Clásica**<br>

[Excelente: Luis Serrano Grokking Machine Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/cnvu0aguzx5a6oczgpa0d/2.-Grokking-Machine-Learning-Serrano.pdf?rlkey=5m1otas2x042rqd14jhacma6a&dl=1)<br>


[Nuevo!! Simon Prine: Understanding Deep Learning](https://www.dropbox.com/s/v7dfcdeju6x8qy8/UnderstandingDeepLearning_02_26_24_C.pdf?dl=1)<br><br>

[Melanie Mitchell: ArtificialIntelligence, A Guide for Thinking Humans](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dvxw3a593prfnwljfn9zs/Melanie-Mitchell-Artificial-Intelligence_-A-Guide-for-Thinking-Humans-Farrar-Straus-and-Giroux-2019.pdf?rlkey=haxmo9jn1ecc0sogdp3dtrwza&dl=1)<br>

[James Bridle: la nueva Edad Oscura](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dzkj3eo9kkdy08zqqze6t/James-Bridle-La-nueva-edad-oscura.pdf?rlkey=kpntil37zb16dflzh1osxzok8&dl=1)<br>


[Stephen Wolfram - What Is ChatGPT Doing](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/3wr8olnytzyeff1hzlltr/Stephen-Wolfram-What-Is-ChatGPT-Doing-_.-and-Why-Does-It-Work_-Wolfram-Media-Inc.-2023.pdf?rlkey=bhg2fdshy0w1ooein9scg6ceg&dl=1)<br>

[Ethem Alpaydin, Machine Learning Mit Press](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/iymjn5mxinvjr35r6x8tc/Ethem-Alpaydin-Machine-Learning-revised-and-updated-edition-The-MIT-Press-Essential-Knowledge-series-The-MIT-Press-2021.pdf?rlkey=41dcahrj5cjhqojrkimvs6x2l&dl=1)<br>

[John Kelleher, DeepLearning](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i5dl9j22qry1sjj96k78m/The-MIT-Press-Essential-Knowledge-John-D.-Kelleher-Deep-Learning-Mit-Press-2019.pdf?rlkey=yaokrvbbpt4jg87evm66m29lt&dl=1)<br>

**Prompt Engineering**<br>

[Nathan Hunter: The Art of Prompt Engineering](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/65no3dtaccdkzjxayhk2o/1.-The-Art-of-Prompt-Engineering-with-chatGPT-Nathan-Hunter.pdf?rlkey=8g3msp5a06j79rzri44axvnaa&dl=1)<br>

[Eric Sarrion:Exploring the Power of ChatGpt](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fo49edborr5shs8acixrc/Eric-Sarrion-Exploring-the-Power-of-ChatGPT-_-Applications-Techniques-and-Implications-Apress.pdf?rlkey=912bm0awny21czw93qw9m0vq2&dl=1)<br>

[Mark Adelson: The ChatGpt Gold Rush](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sbh50p0cqglo9c506w8i6/Adelson-Mark-The-ChatGPT-GoldRush_-Profiting-from-the-AI-Revolution-Online_-Prompt-Engineering-Mastery-with-ChatGPT-2023.pdf?rlkey=bb62e9bgcsli669ij7q4ezscr&dl=1)<br>


## Artículos

<center> ![](https://github.com/jamelende/PaginasWeb/raw/main/Articulos.jpg){width=20%} </center>

 [OpenAi Gpt](https://openai.com/index/gpt-4-research/)<br>
 
 
 [Resnick Ai Opportunities](https://mit-genai.pubpub.org/pub/gj6eod3e/release/2?from=10915&to=11045)<br>
 
  [OpenAi Gpt](https://openai.com/index/gpt-4-research/)



## Cursos en Línea

<center>  ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/tqtp4bz9i35awg8wgjlca/Clusters.gif?rlkey=mpoj07q3obr5b4z2b52xckvxd&dl=1){width=25%}  </center>

**Módulo 1**<br>

[1. Generative AI for Everyone](https://www.coursera.org/learn/generative-ai-for-everyone?utm_campaign=genai4e-launch&utm_medium=institutions&utm_source=deeplearning-ai)<br>
[2. Datacamp , Understanding Prompt Engineering](https://app.datacamp.com/learn/courses/understanding-prompt-engineering)<br>
[3. Andrew Ng , AI for EveryOne](https://www.coursera.org/learn/ai-for-everyone/home/module/3)<br>
[4. Curso Harvard Kennedy School Generative AI](https://generative-ai-course.hks.harvard.edu/)<br>
[5. UMichigan What is Ai? What is ChatGpt?](https://www.coursera.org/lecture/generative-ai-essentials/what-is-ai-what-is-chatgpt-YUQlJ)<br>


**Módulo 2**<br>

[1 DataCamp What is ML?](https://campus.datacamp.com/courses/understanding-machine-learning/what-is-machine-learning?ex=1)<br>
[2. ML Google](https://developers.google.com/machine-learning?hl=es-419)<br>
[3. Andrew Ng Machine Learning](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiPvV5TNogxIS4bHQVW4pMkj4CHA8COdX)<br>
[4. ML for musicians and artists](https://www.kadenze.com/courses/machine-learning-for-musicians-and-artists/info)<br>
[5. Geoffrey Hinton, Coursera Machine Learning Course](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoRl3Ht4JOcdU872GhiYWf6jwrk_SNhz9)<br>
[6. SimpliLearn, Machine Learning Course ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rnEEHT9-c5I)<br>
[7. Yasr Abu Mustafa, Learning from Data](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mbyG85GZ0PI)<br>

**Módulo 3**<br>


[1. Pytorch Course Deep learning](https://github.com/mrdbourke/pytorch-deep-learning)<br>

**Módulo 4**<br>


## Videos


<center>  ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ma38u1l9na3o87ypo41py/5.-Videos-ChatGpt.png?rlkey=6ddj6k3492aczfpgnm4es57j6&dl=1){width=20%}  </center>

**Versiones ChatGPt**<br>


  



[ChatGpt with Canvas](https://openai.com/index/introducing-canvas/)<br>

[ChatGpt 40 Mini](https://openai.com/index/gpt-4o-mini-advancing-cost-efficient-intelligence/)<br>

[ChatGPt o1 Preview](https://openai.com/index/introducing-openai-o1-preview/)

[ChatGpt-o1 Mini](https://openai.com/index/gpt-4o-mini-advancing-cost-efficient-intelligence/)<br>

 
[Nvidia Jensen Huang Do not learn to code](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vEd-LqBCONg)<br>

**Inteligencia Artificial Clásica**<br>

[Canal Espectacular IA](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy5znSnfMsDwaLlROnZ7Qbg/featured)

[Mitchell Why AI is harder than we think](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=agzjHT92ZcU)

[Mustafa Suleyman, What is the AI anyway](https://youtu.be/KKNCiRWd_j0?si=OaIpZtLs_KBnaBM-)

[Rodney Brooks , Generative AI Shaping the Future](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pgrzEHJTPPM&t=2430s)

[Francois Chollet LLMs wont lead to AGI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UakqL6Pj9xo&t=840s)

[3Blue1Brown Transformers](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wjZofJX0v4M&t=187s)

[Mustafa suleyman What is Ai](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KKNCiRWd_j0)


**Historia de la IA**<br>


[Sanja, Geoffrey Hinton | On working with Ilya, choosing problems, and the power of intuition](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n4IQOBka8bc)

[6 years ago, ignoring name of the field!!!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zl99IZvW7rE&t=300s)

[Bloomberg. This Canadian Genius Created Modern AI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l9RWTMNnvi4)<br>



**Machine Learning y Deep learning**<br>



[PlayGround TensorFlow](https://playground.tensorflow.org/)<br>

[Deep Learning Español,Canal 3Blue1Brown](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIb_io8a5NB0CP5ktJE9qaLd6GOfh1Z9m)<br>

  [3Blue1Brown But What is a Neural Network](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aircAruvnKk&t=9s) <br>

## ChatBots


<center> ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/6y0ol4ziczafz06w09y21/ia.gif?rlkey=fed842j2xz8wvhc6srl41ix2r&dl=1){width=20%} </center>

**Chatbots Generales**<br>

[Whimsical generate diagrams](https://whimsical.com/ai)

[Nostalgia fotos viejas en videos](https://deepnostalgia.ai/es)

[Sora creating video from text](https://openai.com/index/sora/)

[read.ai trancribe reuniones](https://www.read.ai/es)

[suno Composición Musical](https://suno.com/) <br>
[elevenlabs: text to speech natural sound](https://elevenlabs.io/) <br>
[SciSpace Chat with a pdf](https://typeset.io/library/untitled-collection-3egzd7ad/levitinch5-pdf-kzyho9cq?ascm=1)<br>

**ChatBotsChatGpt-4o**<br>

[KhanMigo](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-HxPrv1p8v-code-tutor)<br>
[Image Generator](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-pmuQfob8d-image-generator)<br>
[Dall-e](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-2fkFE8rbu-dall-e)<br>
[Data Analyst](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-HMNcP6w7d-data-analyst)<br>
[excel AI](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-R6VqLNHFM-excel-ai)<br>
[Video Summariser](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-66xQYfKVr-video-summariser-pro)<br>

[Video Generator](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-Hkqnd7mFT-video-gpt-by-veed)

[Logo Creator](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-WDtZ2aBA2-logo-creator)<br>
[Powerpoint Generator](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-cJtHaGnyo-presentation-and-slides-gpt-powerpoints-pdfs)<br>
[Code Copilot](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-2DQzU5UZl-code-copilot)<br>
[Emotional Support](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-FGhasb1tZ-therapist-psychologist-non-medical-therapy)<br>
